name: agent-pipeline-marketplace
description: Marketplace for the agent-pipeline plugin: a semi-autonomous multi-agent pipeline that takes a development task from raw request to merged pull request.

plugins.name: agent-pipeline
plugins.description: Semi-autonomous multi-agent pipeline that takes a development task from raw request to merged pull request: an orchestrator supervises per-task pipelines of first-class agents (refiner, designer, implementer, code reviewer, documenter, documentation reviewer, submitter, PR shepherd), each in its own git worktree, with configurable human gating and a decision journal.
